application_name: nAItive Fellowship — H-FARM x Leonid Boguslavsky, Venice
what_they_evaluate: People, not startups or ideas — 'We select people. Not startups. Not ideas.'
Founder quality and personal potential over existing business concept
Capacity to build AI-native companies through orchestration rather than headcount
what_they_emphasize: [inferred] Genuine AI-native thinking — not 'AI-enhanced' but AI-first by design
[inferred] Bias toward building and shipping, not just ideating
[inferred] Ability to scale through systems/orchestration, not team size
[inferred] Intellectual curiosity and coachability (fellowship model, not accelerator)
[inferred] Founders who are early — idea stage or pre-idea is acceptable
[confirmed] Already-built projects are a strong signal — Federico has something
target_persona: Early-stage AI-native founder with strong personal qualities, resilience, and building orientation — idea or no idea both acceptable
review_format: Async form (~30 min) + portfolio review, then presumably interview round
test_or_followup: Unknown — likely interview after application review
competitive_density: 20 fellows per cohort — highly selective [admit rate unknown]

candidate.name: Federico Sassu Verderi
candidate.stage: Has already built something (details in CV)
candidate.hfarm_connection: STRONG — completed H-FARM digital transformation & entrepreneurship path + participated in H-FARM Startup Center pre-accelerator with agromercato.com
candidate.motivation: Wants to develop competitive advantage in AI startup building. Confirmed founder-identity. Wants right competencies, right environment, ambitious peers. Wants to create real impact.
candidate.deadline_notes: Application deadline May 25 — 4 days from today

strategic_notes: CRITICAL ADVANTAGE: Federico has an existing H-FARM connection — nAItive is co-founded by H-FARM. He's essentially an H-FARM ecosystem candidate.
agromercato.com is likely the main 'built' project — needs to be positioned as proof of founder DNA, not just student project
No public portfolio exists — need to build from scratch
Business/Strategy background means we need to show HOW he thinks about AI, not just technical knowledge
4-day runway is tight — prioritize the highest-impact artifacts first
